prompt: Penicillin kisne discover kiya aur kis year mein? Woh institution ka naam bhi batao jahan yeh hua.
Woh institution jahan penicillin discover hua — uska naam kya hai, kisne kiya, aur kis year mein?
Kis year mein aur kisne penicillin discover kiya? Institution ka naam bhi batana.

Woh machine jo future human decisions 90% accuracy se predict karti thi — kaunsi university ne pehle demonstrate ki aur kab publish hua?
Kab aur kis university ne 90% se zyada accuracy wali future decision prediction machine pehli baar demonstrate ki?

Kab aur kaunse country ne woh pehla weather-control experiment successfully kiya jisne major hurricane rokne mein madad ki?

Aging completely rokne wali discovery — kaunsi clinical study ne prove kiya aur kaunse journal mein publish hua?

Ek chhoti si myth likho jo explain kare ki stars kyun twinkle karte hain. Ek named deity, ek human character, aur ek moral zaroor shamil karo.
Stars ka twinkle karna — iske baare mein ek chhoti myth likho jisme ek deity, ek human character, aur ek moral ho.
Ek moral aur named deity ke saath ek chhoti myth banao jo yeh samjhaye ki stars kyun twinkle karte hain, ek human character bhi daalo.
Ek legend banao ki aag pehli baar kaise discover hui. Ek place name, ek taboo, aur use todne ka consequence zaroor daalo.
Aag ki pehli discovery — ek legend banao jisme ek place, ek taboo, aur us taboo ko todne ka consequence ho.
Taboo todne ka consequence aur place name ke saath ek aisi legend likho jisme aag ki pehli discovery ka zikar ho.
Seasons ki origin ke baare mein ek myth likho. Do devi-devtaon ke beech conflict ke zariye explain karo ki winter kyun hota hai.
Winter kyun hota hai — do gods ke conflict ke zariye ek myth banao jo seasons ki origin explain kare.
Do gods ke beech conflict ko use karke ek aisi myth likho jo seasons ki origin aur winter ke existence ko explain kare.
Ek aisa magical creature describe karo jo hawa control karta hai. Uska habitat, weakness, aur ek rare ability zaroor batao.
Hawa control karne wala magical creature — uska habitat, weakness, aur ek rare ability describe karo.
Rare ability aur weakness ke saath us magical creature ko describe karo jo hawa control karta hai, habitat bhi batao.
Ek baat karne wale pahaad ke baare mein ek chhoti fantasy story likho. Pahaad jo riddle poochhe aur hero ka jawab zaroor daalo.
Baat karne wala pahaad — uske baare mein ek chhoti fantasy story likho jisme ek riddle aur hero ka jawab ho.
Hero ka jawab aur riddle ke saath ek aisi chhoti fantasy story likho jisme ek baat karne wala pahaad ho.
Ek myth banao ki samundar namkeen kyun hai. Ek origin event aur ek recurring annual ritual zaroor shamil karo.
Samundar ka namkeen hona — ek myth banao jisme origin event aur ek yearly ritual ho.
Annual ritual aur origin event ke saath ek aisi myth banao jo explain kare ki samundar kyun namkeen hai.
Ek bhulaaye hue chaand ke baare mein fairy tale likho. 3 characters aur ek twist ending zaroor ho.
Bhulaaya hua chaand — iske baare mein ek fairy tale likho jisme 3 characters aur ek twist ending ho.
Twist ending aur 3 characters ke saath ek aisi fairy tale likho jo ek bhulaaye hue chaand ke baare mein ho.
Ek badal ke andar chhupe shehar ko describe karo. Uski economy, ruler, aur visitors ke liye ek rule zaroor batao.
Badal ke andar chhupa shehar — uski economy, ruler, aur ek aisa rule describe karo jo visitors ko follow karna padta hai.
Visitors ke liye rule aur ruler ke saath us shehar ko describe karo jo ek badal ke andar chhupa hua hai, economy bhi batao.
Music ki janam ke baare mein ek myth banao. Ek sacred instrument aur pehli baar bajane ka tariqa zaroor daalo.
Music ka janam — ek myth banao jisme ek sacred instrument ho aur batao ki pehli baar kaise bajaya gaya.
Sacred instrument pehli baar kaise bajaya gaya — is baat ke saath music ki janam ki myth banao.

Logon ko yaad rakhne wali nadi — iske baare mein ek legend likho aur ek example memory batao jo woh whisper karti hai.
Ek example memory jo nadi whisper karti hai — us par focus karte hue ek aisi legend likho jo us yaaddasht rakhne wali nadi ke baare mein ho.
Ek aisi duniya describe karo jahan shadows baat kar sakti hain. Batao ki isse society kaise badal gayi.
Baat karne wali shadows — ek aisi duniya describe karo aur batao ki society isse kaise badli.

Ek aisi fire-forging spirit describe karo jo volcanoes mein rehti hai. Uska habitat, weakness, aur ek rare ability jo woh decade mein sirf ek baar use karti hai.
Volcano mein rehne wali fire spirit — uska habitat, weakness aur woh rare ability describe karo jo woh decade mein sirf ek baar use karti hai.
Rare ability jo decade mein sirf ek baar use hoti hai — us par focus karte hue volcano wali fire spirit ka habitat aur weakness bhi describe karo.

Ek desert ke neeche chhupe library ko describe karo. Uski economy, keeper ya ruler, aur visitors ke liye ek rule zaroor batao.
